РђфShow or hide names of circuit components and sensors in toolboxes.Рђг

Рђф{ $currentType ->
  [electrons] Animated electron flow shown in circuit.
  *[conventional] Animated conventional current arrows shown in circuit.
}Рђг

Рђф{ $currentType ->
  [electrons] Animated electron flow hidden in circuit.
  *[conventional] Animated conventional current arrows hidden in circuit.
}Рђг

CIRCUIT_CONSTRUCTION_KIT_COMMON/a11y.vie: РђфChoose to display circuit components as they appear in real life or as they appear in schematic circuit diagrams.Рђг
РђфCircuit components displayed with lifelike appearance.Рђг
РђфCircuit components displayed with schematic symbols.Рђг
CIRCUIT_CONSTRUCTION_KIT_COMMON/a11y.scr:
Рђф{ $disconnectedCount ->
  [zero] { $groupCount ->
           [zero] .
           [one] , connected in 1 group.
           *[other] , connected in { $groupCountNumber } separate groups.
         }
  [one] { $groupCount ->
          [zero] . One is disconnected.
          [one] . One is disconnected. The remaining { $connectedCount } are connected in 1 group.
          *[other] . One is disconnected. The remaining { $connectedCount } are connected in { $groupCountNumber } separate groups.
        }
  *[other] { $groupCount ->
             [zero] . { $disconnectedCountNumber } are disconnected.
             [one] . { $disconnectedCountNumber } are disconnected. The remaining { $connectedCount } are connected in 1 group.
             *[other] . { $disconnectedCountNumber } are disconnected. The remaining { $connectedCount } are connected in { $groupCountNumber } separate groups.
           }
}Рђг

Рђф{ $hasCurrentFlowing ->
  [flowing] Current is flowing in { $groupsWithCurrent } of { $groupCountNumber } groups.
  *[notFlowing] There is no current flowing.
}Рђг

РђфA Construction Area creates a building space for components added from a Circuit Component Toolbox.  Build and navigate your circuits there. If Voltmeters and Ammeters are out of the toolbox, you can  take measurements.Рђг

РђфVoltmeters and Ammeters can be found in the Sensor Toolbox. Display Options provide ways  to add or remove information about components in the Construction Area. There's an option to choose  between a Lifelike View or a Schematic View for circuit components, and you can Reset All to clear  everything and start over.Рђг

Рђф{ $componentCount ->
  [zero] Currently, Construction Area has no circuit components. Several { $viewType } components are available in Circuit Components carousel.
  *[other] Currently, Construction Area has { $componentCount } circuit components{ $connectivityPhrase } { $currentFlowingPhrase } Several { $viewType } components are available in Circuit Components carousel.
}Рђг
РђфAdd circuit components and start connecting. Be sure to add at least one Wire.Рђг
CIRCUIT_CONSTRUCTION_KIT_COMMON/a11y.sou: РђфSet internal resistance of all batteries, ranging from tiny to 10 ohms.Рђг
CIRCUIT_CONSTRUCTION_KIT_COMMON/a11y.wir: РђфSet resistivity of all wires, ranging from tiny to lots.Рђг
CIRCUIT_CONSTRUCTION_KIT_COMMON/a11y.att: РђфNothing to measure. Add circuit components from toolbox.Рђг
CIRCUIT_CONSTRUCTION_KIT_COMMON/a11y.cir:
Рђф{ $scope ->
  [some] { $direction ->
           [changed] Current through some Group { $groupIndex } circuit elements changed.
           [increased] Current through some Group { $groupIndex } circuit elements increased.
           [decreased] Current through some Group { $groupIndex } circuit elements decreased.
           [stopped] Current through some Group { $groupIndex } circuit elements stopped.
           [reversed] Current through some Group { $groupIndex } circuit elements reversed.
           *[started] Current through some Group { $groupIndex } circuit elements started.
         }
  *[all] { $direction ->
           [changed] Current through all Group { $groupIndex } circuit elements changed.
           [increased] Current through all Group { $groupIndex } circuit elements increased.
           [decreased] Current through all Group { $groupIndex } circuit elements decreased.
           [stopped] Current through Group { $groupIndex } stopped.
           [reversed] Current through all Group { $groupIndex } circuit elements reversed.
           *[started] Current through all Group { $groupIndex } circuit elements started.
         }
}Рђг

Рђф{ $scope ->
  [some] { $direction ->
           [brighter] Some Group { $groupIndex } light bulbs are brighter.
           [dimmer] Some Group { $groupIndex } light bulbs are dimmer.
           [on] Some Group { $groupIndex } light bulbs turned on.
           [off] Some Group { $groupIndex } light bulbs turned off.
           *[changed] Some Group { $groupIndex } light bulbs changed brightness.
         }
  *[all] { $direction ->
           [brighter] All Group { $groupIndex } light bulbs are brighter.
           [dimmer] All Group { $groupIndex } light bulbs are dimmer.
           [on] All Group { $groupIndex } light bulbs turned on.
           [off] All Group { $groupIndex } light bulbs turned off.
           *[changed] All Group { $groupIndex } light bulbs changed brightness.
         }
}Рђг

РђфAdd circuit components and sensors as needed. Then, use connection  options to build circuits, measurement options to take measurements, and edit options  to adjust component specifications. Use Delete key to snip connections or  remove components and sensors. Connected components auto-organize into groups and  everything is movable with the Arrow keys. Checkout Keyboard Shortcuts for more handy shortcuts.Рђг
CIRCUIT_CONSTRUCTION_KIT_COMMON/a11y.att: РђфNo possible connections. Add circuit components from toolbox.Рђг
CIRCUIT_CONSTRUCTION_KIT_COMMON/a11y.cir:
Рђф{ $count ->
  [one] 1 unconnected circuit component. { $componentList }.
  *[other] { $count } unconnected circuit components. { $componentList }.
}Рђг

Рђф{ $allConnected ->
  [true] All connection points connected.
  *[false] Some connection points not connected.
}Рђг

Рђф{ $flowLevel ->
  [all] { $rateCount ->
          [one] Current is flowing through all circuit components at the same rate.
          *[other] Current is flowing through all circuit components at { $rateCount } different rates.
        }
  [some] { $rateCount ->
           [one] Current is flowing through some circuit components at the same rate.
           *[other] Current is flowing through some circuit components at { $rateCount } different rates.
         }
  [none] Current is not flowing.
  *[notShown] Current is not shown.
}Рђг
